hooks.command: echo 'SceneView: gradle.properties edited — run sync-versions.sh to keep all 30+ version locations aligned (root + module gradle.properties, mcp/package.json, llms.txt, README.md, sceneview-web/package.json, flutter pubspec+podspec, docs).'
echo 'SceneView: Android API changed — check whether SceneViewSwift/, sceneview-web/, llms.txt, and mcp/src/ tools need a matching change.'
echo 'SceneView: Swift API changed — check whether sceneview/ (Android), llms.txt (iOS section), and mcp/src/ tools need a matching change.'
echo 'SceneView: Web API changed — check whether sceneview/ (Android) and llms.txt (Web section) need a matching change.'
echo 'SceneView: KMP core changed — affects ALL platforms (Android, iOS, Web). Run :sceneview-core:allTests.'
